name: Apricot Basted Quail
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the apricot basting sauce as directed in Step 2 of the accompanying recipe.
2. Season the quail with salt and pepper, if desired.
3. Place each quail breast-side up on a cutting board or plate.
4. Lay a slice of bacon over the top of each bird.
5. Spoon some of the apricot basting sauce onto the meat of each quail.
6. Fold the wings back toward the body and drizzle any remaining sauce over the birds.
7. Cook the quail in a preheated oven until they reach an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C), about 12-15 minutes per side, depending on size.
8. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
